subcodes.first_line: The servant hath appeared with pen and tablet, yearning that verses be revealed unto him. Say: Verily, they have filled the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر الخادم مع قلم و لوح و اراد ان تنزل له الایات قلنا انها ملئت الارضین و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Manifestation of God as pen, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
